text.title: Flux CD — Setup and Operation Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the methodology end-to-end with decision gates.

step.name: decide-apply-vs-skip
step.action: Decision tree on tool choice + k8s version + team setup.
step.decision-gate: If decision != apply, STOP and document `skip-this-methodology` rationale.

step.name: define-kustomizations-helmreleases
step.action: Per workload pick Kustomization or HelmRelease; turn prune on; wire image automation.

step.name: wire-notifications
step.action: Configure NotificationController to the team channel.

step.name: rbac-isolate-validate
step.action: Isolate tenants via namespaces + RBAC; run validator; commit.
step.decision-gate: If validator exits non-zero, return to the previous draft step and fix violations.
